method: WebFetch on business's own domain + WebSearch cross-checks

businesses.details: 3rd-generation Bryan + Kevin Yuras (Texas A&M alums, took over 2019). Joe Yuras Sr. founded 1949 (1st gen); 2nd gen ran middle; 3rd gen Bryan + Kevin co-own since 2019. Internal-buy-in already executed.
John Edward Bert II (President since 2013, original co-founder/CFO) + Nicole Bert McElwee (VP, longtime office manager, marketing). Both Bert family.
Tina Hall (CEO), Brett Hall (co-owner SME), Jackson Hall (Strategic Growth Architect, 3rd gen) + Heather Kipker (COO). Strong family-succession architecture. 23 team members.

Jonathan Rose (3rd-gen CEO since Jan 2017) + wife Jessica. Lee Rose (1st gen 1972-1990) → Ken Rose (2nd gen, deceased 2014) → Jonathan. Ken's widow Tonya + children Kenneth II + Crystal worked through 2016 then transitioned. Repair crew since 1988, replacement crew since 1997 = strong tenure but residential-only, no commercial contracts.

Chris Arrington (Founder/President, Texas Tech alum) + Reese Arrington (Sales and Marketing Manager) — same surname, on team page. Internal successor visible. James Townsend (Head of Commercial), Randy Eubank (Residential), Robin Eggen (Office Manager).

Acquired 2005 by D.L. Phillips (not original family) from James + Marlyn McKinney. Phillips' daughter Kenedee Hall won internal award 2016 = family-in-operations. Commercial maintenance programs offered.
Bruce Sabine (Owner, in roofing since 1978) + Paden Sabine (Sales/Estimating, same surname). Internal-buy-in candidate visible.

businesses.successor_status: INTERNAL SUCCESSOR IN PLACE + TOO LARGE — DEMOTE
businesses.details: Kelly R. Braddy (3rd gen President/CEO since 2019, joined 2011). Nelson Braddy Jr. (2nd gen founder). 14-state operation, multi-million sq ft projects. Too large for SBA off-market thesis.
Jerry Andrus (Founder/Owner, 43 yrs), Melissa Proffitt + Jeremy Andrus (2nd gen Owners/Stockholders), Trevor Andrus (3rd gen, 6 yrs, sales). 3-gen family-succession in place.

Lon Smith (deceased) → Judy Smith (widow, Secretary/Treasurer). Shawn Michael (President, with company since 1992 via fiancée-family connection — 34 yrs). David Beadles VP. 14-state, $28.7M annual revenue 2026 — too large for off-market SBA thesis.
David Galloway (President/Founder, decorated veteran, 20 yrs). Anna Galloway (CIO, same surname) = family successor. Paul Garcia (VP). Maintenance contracts offered.

Carl Smith (Owner, former RCAT President) + Mark Smith (Operations Manager). Both Smith family. Houston/Austin/Killeen locations. Preventive maintenance programs = strong recurring revenue. Father-son structure visible.
3 generations + 4th coming. Family-owned succession in place. GAF Certified (top 7%).
